Why CarbonBridge

Seven revenue layers.
One platform.

We combine marketplace, brokerage, insurance distribution, data analytics, API services, carbon management SaaS, and managed procurement into a single integrated experience.

Layer 1

Marketplace

Connect project developers with corporate buyers across Verra, Gold Standard, and ACR registries. Multi-registry access from one account.

Layer 2

Insurance

Integrated credit guarantee insurance at checkout via Kita and CFC. Non-delivery cover, invalidation protection, CORSIA guarantees.

Layer 3

Data & Ratings

Credit quality ratings powered by ICVCM CCP criteria. Price benchmarks, vintage analysis, co-benefit scoring, and market intelligence.

Layer 4

Retirement API

Point-of-sale carbon offsetting for e-commerce, airlines, and fintech. REST API with real-time retirement certificates.

Layer 5

Carbon Management

Track emissions, manage compliance obligations, and build your climate strategy with integrated portfolio tools.

Layer 6

Managed Procurement

White-glove procurement for large buyers. CORSIA compliance packages, CBAM credit bundling, and forward offtake structuring.

Live Marketplace

Every credit is independently rated, registry-verified, and available with optional insurance.

Built For You

Solutions by role

Corporate Buyers

Source high-integrity credits for NRCC, CBAM, and voluntary commitments. Compare prices, verify ratings, and insure purchases — all from one dashboard.

  • Multi-registry browsing
  • Quality ratings & price benchmarks
  • Insurance at checkout
  • Portfolio management & compliance tracking
  • Retirement certificates on demand

Project Developers

List your credits on the largest MENA-focused marketplace. Reach corporate buyers, manage inventory, and streamline settlement.

  • Self-serve listing portal
  • Real-time inventory management
  • OTC and marketplace sales channels
  • Institutional-grade settlement (ACX/CIX)
  • Forward contract facilitation

Airlines & CORSIA

Procure CORSIA-eligible credits with Letters of Authorisation and corresponding adjustments. Full compliance packaging.

  • CORSIA-eligible credit sourcing
  • Letter of Authorisation procurement
  • Insurance-wrapped delivery
  • Multi-year forward offtake agreements
  • Dedicated procurement desk

API Clients

Embed carbon offsetting into your checkout, app, or platform with our REST API. Real-time retirement and certificate generation.

  • Point-of-sale retirement API
  • Webhook notifications
  • Certificate generation
  • White-label options
  • Usage-based pricing from $0.02/tonne
Market Intelligence

Data you can
actually trust.

Every credit on CarbonBridge is rated against ICVCM Core Carbon Principles. No guesswork. No greenwashing. Independent quality scores, price benchmarks, and vintage analysis — updated in real time.

Quality Ratings

AAA to C scale based on ICVCM CCP criteria, additionality assessment, permanence risk, and co-benefit scoring.

Price Intelligence

Real-time benchmarks by credit type, geography, and vintage. Historical trends and forward curve estimates.

Compliance Mapping

See which credits qualify for NRCC, CBAM, CORSIA, SBTi BVCM, and VCMI claims — before you buy.

Integrated Insurance

Buy with confidence.

Every purchase on CarbonBridge can be insured at checkout. Protection backed by Lloyd's of London syndicates including Munich Re, Chaucer, and Tokio Marine Kiln.

Non-Delivery

Full refund if credits are not delivered as specified in the purchase agreement.

Invalidation

Protection against post-issuance invalidation by the registry due to methodology or verification failures.

Political Risk

Coverage for sovereign intervention, export bans, or regulatory changes in the project host country.

CORSIA Guarantee

Insurance that credits will maintain CORSIA eligibility through the compliance period. Approved by Gold Standard and Verra.

Insurance distributed by CarbonBridge. Underwritten by Lloyd's of London syndicates via Kita and CFC.

Compliance Countdown

The Gulf compliance
wave is here.

Three regulatory forces are converging on the MENA region simultaneously — creating the largest carbon credit demand event in the Gulf's history.

UAE NRCC66 days

National Registry for Carbon Credits. Mandatory reporting for large UAE emitters. First compliance deadline.

Deadline: May 30, 2026
EU CBAM282 days

Carbon Border Adjustment Mechanism. UAE aluminium, steel, cement, and fertiliser exporters to the EU must purchase EU-equivalent carbon credits.

Deadline: Jan 1, 2027
CORSIA Phase 2Procurement now

Mandatory carbon offsetting for international aviation. Gulf carriers (Emirates, Etihad, Qatar Airways) require millions of CORSIA-eligible credits annually.

Deadline: 2027–2035
About Us

Built by operators,
not observers.

CarbonBridge was founded by a team with deep experience across carbon markets, institutional finance, and technology — based in the UAE and Australia. We don't just build platforms. We trade, advise, and source credits alongside our clients.

ADGM-registered entity
Verra General Account holder
ACX Abu Dhabi member
Institutional settlement via ACX, CIX, and Carbonplace
Insurance distribution via Lloyd's of London
Our Position
“The first self-serve carbon credit marketplace with integrated insurance, data analytics, and compliance tools — built specifically for the MENA market.”

No existing platform combines marketplace + brokerage + insurance + data + API + carbon management + managed procurement in one product.

Ready to trade?

Whether you're buying your first credit or managing a multi-million dollar compliance programme — we'll help you navigate the carbon market with confidence.
